productive_bridges: V-ATPase pH microdomains as condensate nucleation templates
VGCC activation threshold as binary condensate gate via CaMKII-FUS phosphorylation
Circadian V-ATPase oscillation as condensate renewal mechanism
Wound injury current as condensate dissolution trigger

killed_hypotheses.title: Electric Field-Directed Condensate Positioning Explains Left-Right Asymmetry Breaking
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Electrophoretic force from physiological electric fields (~10^-17 N) is ~1000x too weak to overcome thermal noise (~10^-14 N). Established cilia-based mechanism explains laterality.

killed_hypotheses.title: Morphogenetic Memory Is Physically Stored in Self-Sustaining Condensate-Voltage Circuits
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Dropped (not killed): Condensate lifetime (minutes-hours) incompatible with memory duration (weeks-months). 1,6-hexanediol test fatally confounded by kinase/phosphatase inhibition.

killed_hypotheses.title: Gap Junction-Mediated Ion Sharing Creates Tissue-Scale Condensate Coherence Domains
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Dropped: Quantitative argument too weak. Gap junction ion transfer magnitude likely insufficient to shift condensate formation thresholds in receiving cells.

surviving_hypotheses: V-ATPase pH-Condensate Nodes as the Molecular Effector Layer of the Bioelectric Code
Calcium-Gated Condensate Dissolution as the Binary Transduction Step in Bioelectric Pattern Reading
Circadian V-ATPase Rhythms and Tissue-Specific Condensate Phase Diagrams Determine Chronovulnerability to Neurodegeneration
Wound-Edge V-ATPase Activation Triggers Condensate Dissolution Wave as a Rapid Regenerative Signal
key_papers: Bhatt et al. 2024 Cell - condensates regulate electrochemical equilibria (CRITICAL BRIDGE PAPER)
Levin 2023 - bioelectric code as computational medium
2025 Nat Chem - condensates sustain pH gradients without energy
Brown & Nagel 2025 - circadian clock and stress-induced condensates
Burrinha 2023 - V-ATPase decline in aged neurons
lessons_learned: Disjoint field pairs produce highest novelty; the bioelectric x condensate pair had no cross-citations
V-ATPase emerged as the strongest bridge concept across ALL four final hypotheses
Back-of-envelope physics calculations are essential for filtering impossible hypotheses early (saved H8 from wasting pipeline time)
pH-mediated mechanisms are more tractable than direct electric field effects on condensates
The most groundable hypotheses use INDIRECT bioelectric effects (via pH, Ca2+) rather than direct electric field effects

targets.field_c: Stem cell niche biology -- spatial organization and mechanical regulation

defect splitting instability as crypt fission trigger

productive_bridges: Poincare-Hopf theorem constraining defect positions on organoid surfaces
Defect splitting instability (Giomi 2014) as quantitative crypt fission trigger via alpha_c ~ K/R^2
ECM stiffness-mediated defect pinning converting transient wound defects to permanent niches
YAP/TAZ mechanotransduction at defect compressive stress sites maintaining stemness

killed_hypotheses.title: Hair Follicle Placode Spacing Emerges from a Topological Defect Lattice in the Embryonic Epidermal Nematic
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Edar mechanosensitivity bridge entirely speculative. Turing reaction-diffusion models already explain spacing. Adds complexity without added explanatory power.

killed_hypotheses.title: Bone Marrow HSC Niche Quiescence Is Maintained by Shear-Free Zones at -1/2 Nematic Defects in Sinusoidal Endothelium
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Sinusoidal endothelium is fenestrated and too disordered for nematic order. Also targets wrong vascular compartment (HSC quiescence is arteriolar, not sinusoidal).

killed_hypotheses.title: Cancer Stem Cell Niches Self-Organize at Topological Defects in Tumor Cell Nematic Fields
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Active area (Saw group already exploring defects in cancer). Reduced novelty. CSC identity may be a dynamic state, not positionable. 3D tumor complexity limits 2D framework.

killed_hypotheses.title: Stem Cell Niche Aging Is Driven by Loss of Nematic Order and Consequent Defect Delocalization
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Vocabulary re-description of known phenomena (aging -> tissue disorganization). Fabricated quantitative parameters (S values). No mechanistic advantage over existing explanations.

killed_hypotheses.title: Geometric Frustration of the Nematic Field at Tissue Boundaries Creates Defect Reservoirs
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Universality claim falsified (many tissue interfaces lack stem cells). Reverses developmental causation.

killed_hypotheses.title: Topological Charge Conservation Constrains the Total Number of Stem Cell Niches Per Organ
killed_hypotheses.kill_reason: Mathematically invalid. Topological charge conservation constrains NET charge, not TOTAL defect number. Small intestine has ~10M crypts vs topological minimum of 0.

surviving_hypotheses: Organoid Symmetry Breaking Is a Topological Defect Nucleation Event
Activity-Dependent Crypt Fission Is Triggered When Local Epithelial Contractility Exceeds the Nematic Defect-Splitting Threshold
Wound-Induced Topological Defects Serve as Transient Stem Cell Attractors That Become Permanent Niches When Pinned by ECM Stiffness Gradients
key_papers: Saw et al. 2017 Nature -- topological defects drive cell extrusion in MDCK monolayers
Maroudas-Sacks et al. 2021 Nature Physics -- defects organize body axis in Hydra
Giomi et al. 2014 -- defect splitting instability in active nematics
Duclos et al. 2017 -- Frank elastic constants in cell monolayers
Blanch-Mercader et al. 2021 -- active stress measurements in epithelial sheets
Nikolaev et al. 2020 Nature -- organoids in shaped microwells
Ito et al. 2007 -- wound-induced hair neogenesis (WIHN)
Yui et al. 2018 -- YAP in intestinal stem cell maintenance
Bowick et al. 2009 -- curvature-defect coupling on curved surfaces
Kleman & Lavrentovich 2003 -- defect pinning in liquid crystals
lessons_learned: Poincare-Hopf theorem provides mathematically NECESSARY predictions that cannot be dismissed -- the strongest possible foundation for a hypothesis
The single most critical assumption is whether a given tissue exhibits measurable nematic order -- this determines whether the entire framework applies

Quantitative back-of-envelope estimates are essential: the concentration enhancement for free diffusion was negligible (~1%), killing the original H6 mechanism, while restricted-diffusion morphogens gave meaningful ~30% enhancement
Universal claims are dangerous: 'all tissue interfaces have stem cells' was immediately falsifiable. Scope hypotheses to specific tissues where the assumptions hold
Vocabulary re-description without mechanistic insight is a failure mode (H7 'nematic order parameter' was just 'cell polarity' in physics language)
Mathematical validity must be checked: the topological charge conservation hypothesis was mathematically invalid because it confused NET charge with TOTAL defect number
The organoid experimental system provides the cleanest test: controlled geometry + topology + existing culture technology = rapid falsification
DISJOINT field pairs continue to produce the highest novelty -- active matter physicists and stem cell biologists have zero cross-citations
